data.body: 568c 3rd amend (4dd9172b9): comprehensive AC audit fixes (AC1 recorded x5, AC2 inferred replay, AC3 broadened process_snapshot guard for absent/None/provisional-unknown + reducer tests, ceiling 867). All new tests + guard pass locally + regression 27 pass. #766 Verified flaking HARD: 4 consecutive enrich-prune failures on patchset 4 (confirmed ONLY that test fails, lost count varies 46-241 = race; my tests/guard pass). High CI-load flake period. Persisting with self-rechecking poll (bigger budget). Once green: re-close 568c -> submit -> close epic.
